inputs.label: Solar Zenith Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the sun and the vertical. 0° means sun directly overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between the sun and the vertical. 0° means sun directly overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güneş ile dikey arasındaki açı. 0° güneşin tam tepede olduğu anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen Sonne und Vertikalen. 0° bedeutet Sonne direkt über Kopf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre le soleil et la verticale. 0° signifie soleil directement au zénith.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre el sol y la vertical. 0° significa sol directamente sobre la cabeza.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين الشمس والعمودي. 0° تعني الشمس مباشرة فوق الرأس.

inputs.label: Ozone Column Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Total ozone column in Dobson Units. Typical range 200–500 DU.

label_i18n.es: Espesor de la columna de ozono

businessContext_i18n.en: Total ozone column in Dobson Units. Typical range 200–500 DU.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dobson Birimi cinsinden toplam ozon kolonu. Tipik aralık 200–500 DU.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Ozonsäule in Dobson-Einheiten. Typischer Bereich 200–500 DU.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Colonne d'ozone totale en unités Dobson. Plage typique 200–500 DU.
businessContext_i18n.es: Columna total de ozono en Unidades Dobson. Rango típico 200–500 DU.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عمود الأوزون بوحدات دوبسون. النطاق النموذجي 200–500 DU.

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elevation above sea level in meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Meeresspiegel in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación sobre el nivel del mar en metros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع عن مستوى سطح البحر بالأمتار.

inputs.label: Surface Albedo
inputs.businessContext: Reflectivity of the ground surface, between 0 and 1. Typical grass: 0.03, snow: 0.8.

businessContext_i18n.en: Reflectivity of the ground surface, between 0 and 1. Typical grass: 0.03, snow: 0.8.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zemin yüzeyinin yansıtıcılığı, 0 ile 1 arasında. Tipik çimen: 0,03, kar: 0,8.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reflexionsgrad der Bodenoberfläche, zwischen 0 und 1. Typisches Gras: 0,03, Schnee: 0,8.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réflectivité de la surface du sol, entre 0 et 1. Herbe typique : 0,03, neige : 0,8.
businessContext_i18n.es: Reflectividad de la superficie del suelo, entre 0 y 1. Hierba típica: 0.03, nieve: 0.8.
businessContext_i18n.ar: انعكاسية سطح الأرض، بين 0 و1. العشب النموذجي: 0.03، الثلج: 0.8.

inputs.label: Aerosol Optical Depth
inputs.businessContext: Aerosol optical depth at 550 nm. Clear atmosphere: 0.05–0.1, polluted: >0.5.

businessContext_i18n.en: Aerosol optical depth at 550 nm. Clear atmosphere: 0.05–0.1, polluted: >0.5.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 550 nm'de aerosol optik derinlik. Temiz atmosfer: 0,05–0,1, kirli: >0,5.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aerosol-Optische Dicke bei 550 nm. Klare Atmosphäre: 0,05–0,1, verschmutzt: >0,5.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur optique des aérosols à 550 nm. Atmosphère claire : 0,05–0,1, polluée : >0,5.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad óptica de aerosoles a 550 nm. Atmósfera limpia: 0.05–0.1, contaminada: >0.5.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق البصري للهباء الجوي عند 550 نانومتر. الغلاف الجوي النقي: 0.05–0.1، الملوث: >0.5.

inputs.label: Cloud Cover Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of sky covered by clouds, 0 (clear) to 1 (overcast).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of sky covered by clouds, 0 (clear) to 1 (overcast).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gökyüzünün bulutlarla kaplı oranı, 0 (açık) ile 1 (kapalı) arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Himmels, der von Wolken bedeckt ist, 0 (klar) bis 1 (bedeckt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction du ciel couverte par les nuages, 0 (clair) à 1 (couvert).
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción del cielo cubierta por nubes, 0 (despejado) a 1 (nublado).
businessContext_i18n.ar: كسر السماء المغطاة بالغيوم، 0 (صافٍ) إلى 1 (مُغطى بالكامل).
